description_long: This is a large, cylindrical trash bin made of dark, weathered plastic, commonly found in urban environments such as streets, parks, or garages. The bin features a wide, reinforced rim at the top, providing structural strength and ease of handling. Two robust, side-mounted handles are integrated into the upper section, allowing for easy lifting and maneuvering. The surface of the bin is textured and shows signs of wear, with scuff marks and discoloration typical of prolonged outdoor use. The body tapers slightly towards the base, optimizing stability and capacity. There is no visible lid, and the opening is unobstructed, making it suitable for quick disposal of waste.
description: A large, cylindrical, dark plastic trash bin with integrated side handles and a wide open top, showing signs of outdoor wear. The surface is textured and the bin is designed for easy handling and high capacity.
description_view_0: Front view showing the cylindrical body, wide open top, and one of the integrated side handles.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the full handle design and vertical ridges for structural support.
description_view_2: Rear view similar to the front, with the opposite handle visible and the same open-top design.
description_view_3: Side view with the other handle and vertical reinforcement details visible.
